title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Oliveboard - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Oliveboard - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Oliveboard invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Oliveboard:
Oliveboard is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oliveboard!
